expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The yellow button in the top-right header appears blank with no visible label or icon, so users cannot tell what action it performs.
The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay sits on top of the fine print/legal copy near the bottom of the promo, making that text partially unreadable.
The fine print at the bottom is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on a mobile viewport.
Some fine print appears in dark blue over an orange/yellow gradient, which may have insufficient contrast in parts of the background.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 describes a button in the top area (top-right header) that is blank with no visible label, matching the missing text on a top nav button.
